title: phyllanthus cornutus
intro: Phyllanthus cornutus, also known as the horned phyllanthus or kantakari, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus cornutus include its ability to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations, including decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
